title: ERP Extension Hook Payload
description: The JSON body POSTed to a registered extension hook's target_url. See README.md for the full contract, including how to verify the X-Signature header.

doctype.description: The document type being saved, e.g. 'PurchaseOrder'.

document_id.description: The document's id. May be empty on a before_save for a brand-new document that hasn't been assigned one yet.

tenant_id.description: Which client/tenant this document belongs to. A hook is always scoped to a single tenant's registered hooks - this field is provided for your own logging/routing, not as an access boundary you need to enforce yourself.

data.description: The full document payload as it will be (before_save) or was (after_save) written.
